page.title: K80: Best Boat in Marbella for Value flybridge for 10+ guests

data.meta_description: Discover why the K80 is the best boat in Marbella for value flybridge for 10+ guests. €4,719 minimum 4h from Puerto Banús with jet ski included.
data.summary: The K80 offers a 24m flybridge with space for 12 guests, departing Puerto Banús from €4,719 for 4 hours including a free jet ski. This page explains why it's the best value boat for groups of 10 or more in Marbella.
key_facts: K80: 24m length, 12 pax, departs Puerto Banús
Price: €4,719 minimum 4h (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VAT included)
Free jet ski included with every K80 charter
Flybridge layout with sunbeds, dining area, and bimini shade
Licensed skipper and crew provided with all charters
Ideal for groups of 10-12 seeking a spacious, luxury day out
All charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
Book via WhatsApp for exact availability and custom itineraries

faq.q: How many guests can the K80 accommodate?
faq.a: The K80 takes up to 12 guests, making it ideal for groups of 10 or more. The flybridge and main deck provide plenty of space for everyone to relax, dine, and enjoy the sun.

faq.q: What is the minimum charter duration for the K80?
faq.a: The minimum charter is 4 hours, priced at €4,719. This includes the licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a free jet ski. Longer durations can be arranged on request.

faq.q: Does the K80 charter include a jet ski?
faq.a: Yes, a jet ski is included free of charge with every K80 charter. The crew will help you use it safely from the boat during your trip.

faq.q: What drinks and snacks are provided on the K80?
faq.a: Your charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You can also bring your own food and drink if you prefer.

faq.q: Where does the K80 depart from?
faq.a: The K80 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. The crew will meet you at the dock and help you board.

faq.q: Can we customise the itinerary on the K80?
faq.a: Absolutely. The skipper will discuss your preferred route, whether you want to anchor at Cala del Faro, cruise past the Golden Mile, or head to Cabopino. Just let them know.

faq.q: Is the K80 suitable for a party or celebration?
faq.a: Yes, the flybridge and spacious main deck are perfect for birthday parties, anniversaries, or corporate events. The crew can help arrange catering or decorations on request.

faq.q: How do I book the K80?
faq.a: All bookings are handled via WhatsApp. Contact us with your preferred date, duration, and any special requests, and we'll confirm availability and arrange payment.

data.body_html:
If you're searching for the K80 best for a group of 10 or more guests who want a proper flybridge experience without the superyacht price tag, this 24-metre boat from Puerto Banús is the answer. With space for 12 guests, a free jet ski, and all-inclusive pricing from €4,719 for 4 hours, the K80 delivers genuine value for a luxury day out on the Costa del Sol.

Why the K80 is the best value flybridge for 10+ guests

Most flybridge boats in Marbella that can comfortably seat 10–12 guests sit in the €5,000+ bracket for a half-day. The K80 undercuts that figure while still offering a 24-metre platform, a proper flybridge with sunbeds and dining, and a crew who know the coast from Puerto Banús to Estepona. The included jet ski adds €300–500 of value on its own. For a group of 10, that works out at less than €120 per person per hour — cheaper than a night out on the Golden Mile.

K80 specifications and layout

  • Length: 24 metres
  • Capacity: 12 guests
  • Departure point: Puerto Banús
  • Minimum charter: 4 hours (€4,719 all-inclusive)
  • Included: Skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, IVA (21%), jet ski

The flybridge is the highlight: a large sunbathing area aft, a dining table forward under a bimini, and a wet bar. The main deck has a salon with air conditioning, a full galley, and a bow sunpad. There's also a lower cabin with a bathroom if anyone needs to freshen up.

How the K80 compares to other boats in our fleet

Our fleet includes several boats for 12 guests, but the K80 stands out for price-to-space ratio. The Mangusta 80 (also 24m, 12 pax) starts at the same €4,719 minimum, but the K80's flybridge layout feels more open for lounging. The Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) is smaller and priced on request, so the K80 offers more deck area for the same guest count. For groups who want a flybridge without paying €7,000+ for a Ferretti 94, the K80 is the sweet spot.

Best itineraries for the K80 from Puerto Banús

With 4 hours, you can cruise east to Cala del Faro (20 minutes from port), anchor in the calm waters, and use the jet ski to explore the cliffs. Alternatively, head west to Cala Cortés near Estepona, where the water is usually flat and the beach clubs are a short swim away. For a longer day (6–8 hours), the crew can take you to Sotogrande or even Gibraltar on request. The skipper knows the best spots for swimming, lunch at a chiringuito, or simply soaking up the sun on the flybridge.

What's included in the K80 charter price

Every K80 charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). The open bar covers water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava, plus light snacks. The jet ski is included at no extra cost. There are no hidden fees — the price you see is the price you pay. You can bring your own food and drink if you prefer, but the included package is generous enough for most groups.

Who is the K80 best for?

The K80 suits birthday parties, corporate groups, stag or hen dos (with respect for the boat), and families who want a flybridge without the formality of a crewed superyacht. It's also a great choice for first-time charterers who want to see what a 24-metre boat feels like without committing to a full-day rate. If you're planning a celebration or just a day on the water with friends, the K80 gives you the space and the toys without the premium price.

How to book the K80

All bookings go through WhatsApp. Contact us with your preferred date, duration (minimum 4 hours), and any special requests like catering or a specific itinerary. We'll confirm availability and send payment details. The boat is based at Puerto Banús, so you'll meet the crew at the dock and board directly. For more details on our entire fleet, visit the Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

Frequently asked questions

How many guests can the K80 accommodate?

The K80 takes up to 12 guests, making it ideal for groups of 10 or more. The flybridge and main deck provide plenty of space for everyone to relax, dine, and enjoy the sun.

What is the minimum charter duration for the K80?

The minimum charter is 4 hours, priced at €4,719. This includes the licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a free jet ski. Longer durations can be arranged on request.

Does the K80 charter include a jet ski?

Yes, a jet ski is included free of charge with every K80 charter. The crew will help you use it safely from the boat during your trip.

What drinks and snacks are provided on the K80?

Your charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You can also bring your own food and drink if you prefer.

Where does the K80 depart from?

The K80 departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. The crew will meet you at the dock and help you board.

Can we customise the itinerary on the K80?

Absolutely. The skipper will discuss your preferred route, whether you want to anchor at Cala del Faro, cruise past the Golden Mile, or head to Cabopino. Just let them know.

Is the K80 suitable for a party or celebration?

Yes, the flybridge and spacious main deck are perfect for birthday parties, anniversaries, or corporate events. The crew can help arrange catering or decorations on request.

How do I book the K80?

All bookings are handled via WhatsApp. Contact us with your preferred date, duration, and any special requests, and we'll confirm availability and arrange payment.
